Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct Spelling Of The Plaintiff In The Judgment
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PERFORMANCE FOOD GROUP INC.'s Motion To Correct Spelling Of The Plaintiff In The Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar

Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Smitty's BBQ, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Andy's BBQ.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

David J. Cook, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Performance Food Group Inc., a corporation.
Cristin Garden, Credit Manager for plaintiff Performance Food Group Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Cook and Ms. Garden appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Smitty's BBQ, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Andy's BBQ.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Goods Sold and Delivered was filed on October 2, 2020, and personally served on defendant Smitty's BBQ, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Andy's BBQ's Agent of Process on October 5, 2020.
Default as to defendant Smitty's BBQ, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Andy's BBQ, was entered on November 17, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 4, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Performance Food Group Inc., a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Smitty's BBQ, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Andy's BBQ, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $90,013.45.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,909.88.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $94,438.33.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
